$$ DECLARE start_time TIMESTAMP; end_time TIMESTAMP; trad_time INTERVAL; daans_time INTERVAL; test_point GEOGRAPHY; i INTEGER; BEGIN -- Create a test point in SF test_point := ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(-122.4194, 37.7749), 4326)::geography; -- Benchmark traditional PostGIS transformation start_time := clock_timestamp(); FOR i IN 1..iterations LOOP -- What Google does now: multiple trigonometric operations PERFORM ST_Transform(test_point::geometry, 3857); -- Web Mercator PERFORM ST_Distance(test_point, test_point); PERFORM ST_Area(ST_Buffer(test_point, 100)); END LOOP; end_time := clock_timestamp(); trad_time := end_time - start_time; -- Benchmark DAANSphere transformation start_time := clock_t ...
